ground_truth_facts.fact: User has mild asthma and carries an inhaler for exercise-induced symptoms
User wants to build overall fitness, improve confidence, and reduce belly fat
User has persistent social anxiety about being judged and observed at the gym as a beginner
User strongly prefers working out alone and wants to avoid crowded peak gym hours
User is highly sedentary, spending 8-10 hours daily on computer for gaming and studies
User is a complete beginner who has never followed a structured workout routine

conversation_messages: I've never really worked out in my life. Like zero structured exercise ever. I want to change that but I honestly don't know where to start.
I have mild asthma — it's mostly exercise-induced. I carry an inhaler but I've never really pushed myself physically so I don't know how it'll react.
My main goals are just to get fit, lose the belly fat, and feel more confident in general. Nothing extreme.
Honestly the biggest thing holding me back from the gym is that I feel like everyone there knows what they're doing except me. I get anxious just thinking about it.
I spend way too much time on my PC — gaming and studying. Probably 8-10 hours a day. My lifestyle is extremely sedentary.
Is working out at home a viable option? I don't think I'm ready to go to a gym where people can see me.
I tried going to the gym once with a friend and I was so conscious the entire time. Left after 20 minutes.
What cardio can I do that won't trigger my asthma? I tried running once and it was bad.
If I do go to the gym, when is it least crowded? I'd rather go when it's empty.
I don't have any equipment at home. Just a yoga mat. What can I realistically do?
How long before I start seeing some results? I need something to keep me motivated early on.
I've been reading about beginner programs. Starting Strength vs calisthenics — which makes more sense for someone who's never trained?
My confidence is really low. I feel like I'm already behind everyone else my age.

probe_queries.query: What cardio exercises can I do safely?
I feel embarrassed going to the gym, everyone there looks so experienced
When should I go to the gym to avoid crowds?
I sit at my computer all day, where do I even start with fitness?
Can I get good results working out at home instead of the gym?
Build me a beginner workout plan
